publicV1.reason: Task and nested schedule-run projections gain a control-plane dependency failure variant, while task creation and repository reads consistently preserve the authenticated non-main default branch selected by the shared task domain path.

mcp.reason: Matching tools expose the same safe failure in direct task and nested schedule-run responses, plus refreshed default-branch values through canonical contracts without a provider-specific branch fallback.

openapi.reason: The task failure schema, its nested schedule-run projections, and default-branch semantics derive from the canonical public registry and shared contracts.

apiPlayground.reason: The playground derives the affected task and schedule-run failure rendering plus repository default-branch projections from the same registry.

internalOnly.reason: Installs and attests the API Git dependency, separates local dependency failures from network failures, refreshes verified forge metadata explicitly, and adds Console refresh plus direct-task and schedule-run deployment-repair presentation.

protocolDifferences.detail: Idempotency-Key remains an HTTP-only retry contract and is not an MCP argument.
MCP structured content remains the canonical Task while compatibility text retains the historical task handle.
MCP metadata continues to describe asynchronous task observation without claiming support for the HTTP-only idempotency header.
REST keeps its dedicated task-create throttle while MCP remains subject to the MCP transport limiter.
